cluster.a11yHint: Double tap to open the full story.

storyDetail.title: Story
storyDetail.openHintRead: Double tap to open this story.
storyDetail.openHintPlay: Double tap to play this episode.

a11y.author: Author: {{name}}.
a11y.enableHint: Double tap to enable this source.
a11y.disableHint: Double tap to disable this source.
a11y.itemHintIos: Double tap to open. Swipe up or down to access Save, Mark Read, Mute Source, Summary, and Share.
a11y.itemHintIosPodcast: Double tap to open episode. Swipe up or down to access Queue, Save, Mark Read, Mute Source, Summary, and Share.
a11y.itemHintAndroid: Double tap to open. Double tap and hold for more options including Save, Mute Source, and Share.
a11y.itemHintAndroidPodcast: Double tap to open episode. Double tap and hold for more options including Queue, Save, Mute Source, and Share.

home.title: Main Street Gazette
home.searchDoneHint: Double tap to close the search field and clear the search query.
home.searchHint: Enter words to search article titles, summaries, sources, and tags. Activate the Done button to close search.

menu.moreActionsHint: Double tap for mark all as read, jump to marker, and jump to top.

empty.noNewBody: You've read everything up to your marker. Tap 'Show all' to see older stories.
empty.todayBody: Check back later or pull to refresh to bring in today's stories.
empty.noStoriesBody: Refresh feeds or enable more sources to bring in Disney news.
empty.noFavoritesBody: No stories currently match your favorite regions, parks, or topics. Try adding a few more, or check back later.

announce.searchShown: Find in timeline field shown. Enter your search terms.
announce.filterLocked: Filter is locked to Articles while a park is selected. Set By Park to All Parks to change the filter.
announce.sinceLastVisit_one: Showing {{count}} article since your last visit.
announce.sinceLastVisit_other: Showing {{count}} articles since your last visit.

welcome.tagline: Your Disney universe, all in one place.
welcome.body: Park news, videos, podcasts, and community updates — curated for Disney fans.
welcome.getStartedHint: Double tap to begin setting up your feed.

sources.title: What would you like to follow?
sources.subtitle: Fine-tune individual sources anytime in Settings.
sources.articlesDesc: Park news, food, planning, and more from top Disney sites
sources.videosDesc: YouTube channels from top Disney creators

prefs.title: A few quick preferences
prefs.subtitle: Everything can be changed later in Settings.
prefs.cacheQuestion: How long should we keep articles?
prefs.refreshA11y: Refresh news when opening the app
prefs.refreshHint: Fetch the latest stories automatically each time you open Main Street Gazette
prefs.refreshDesc: Fetch latest stories when you open the app

favorites.title: Any resorts you follow closely?
favorites.subtitle: Optional — pick as many as you like. This powers a "Favorites" option on the News tab that shows just these. You can change this anytime in Settings.

done.title: You're all set!
done.body: Welcome to Main Street Gazette. Your first news refresh is on the way.
done.startReadingHint: Double tap to enter Main Street Gazette.

analytics.title: Feed Health
analytics.rowHint: View source activity, coverage gaps, and feed quality metrics.

notifications.quietHoursDesc: Suppress non-breaking notifications between 10 PM and 7 AM.
notifications.breakingNewsDesc: Receive immediate alerts for breaking Disney news.
notifications.dailyDigestDesc: Bundle lower-priority stories into a single daily summary notification.
notifications.profileRowHint: Choose how many notifications you receive. Opens Personalization settings.

profile.label: Your name (optional)
profile.hint: Enter your first name to personalise greetings in the app. Leave blank to remove.

feed.autoRefreshDesc: Fetch enabled feeds when the app starts.
feed.showOnlyNewDesc: Hide older stories until you choose to show all.

reading.readerModeDesc: Open articles in Safari's distraction-free reader view automatically.

cache.offlineDesc: Show cached content when the network is unavailable.
cache.clearCacheHint: Removes articles older than your retention window.

audio.soundEffectsDesc: Play sounds for saves, refresh, errors, and notifications.
audio.hapticsDesc: Vibrate on saves, refresh, errors, and notifications. iOS only.

access.spacingDesc: Adds more breathing room for low-vision layouts.
access.boldDesc: Makes source and time metadata easier to scan.
access.hideThumbnailsDesc: Reduces visual clutter in feed rows.
access.highContrastDesc: Sharpens borders and deepens text colours for clearer reading.
access.simplifiedLayoutDesc: Shows title and source only — removes summaries, thumbnails, and metadata.
access.voSimpleDesc: Title and content type only. Fast to scan; source and age are a swipe away.
access.voSimplePreview: Podcast. The Dis Unplugged — The 500th Episode Special.
access.voNormalDesc: Title, source, and age — useful context without the full details.
access.voNormalPreview: Podcast. The Dis Unplugged — The 500th Episode Special. Source: The DIS. Published 2 hours ago.
access.voAllDesc: Everything: title, source, author, age, duration, and status.
access.voAllPreview: Podcast. The Dis Unplugged — The 500th Episode Special. Source: The DIS. Published 2 hours ago. Duration 1 hour and 23 minutes. New. Saved.
access.newSummaryDesc: Announce how many new articles are available since your last visit.
access.cardDensityComfortableA11y: Comfortable spacing, standard padding between cards
access.cardDensityCompactA11y: Compact spacing, more headlines visible on screen

sync.masterDesc: Sync your data across iPhone and iPad with iCloud.
sync.iosOnly: iCloud Sync is only available on iPhone and iPad.

privacy.disclaimer: Main Street Gazette stores feeds, saved items, source choices, settings, queue, and playback progress locally on this device. No accounts, ads, analytics, or tracking.
privacy.legal: Main Street Gazette is an independent feed reader and podcast player. Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Disney or the listed publishers.
privacy.privacyPolicyHint: Double tap to open the privacy policy in your browser.
privacy.supportHint: Double tap to open the support page in your browser.

forYou.title: For You
forYou.resumePodcastHint: Double tap to resume this episode.
forYou.openLibraryHint: Double tap to see everything you've saved and your collections.
forYou.manageSourcesHint: Double tap to change which sources you follow.

saved.title: Saved
saved.searchHint: Enter words to search saved items and the news feed throughout the app.
saved.emptyBody: Saved articles and episodes will appear here.

library.title: The Gazette Library
library.searchHint: Enter words to search everything you've saved.
library.emptyBody: Save articles, videos, and podcasts to build your Gazette Library.
library.growing: Your Gazette Library continues to grow as you explore.

sources.title: Sources
sources.searchHint: Enter words to filter the list of active sources.
sources.manageHint: Double tap to enable or disable individual sources.
sources.noEnabled: No sources are enabled. Tap Manage Sources to turn some on.
sources.sourceHint: Double tap to read articles from this source.

feed.openArticleHint: Double tap to open this article in reader view.
feed.openPodcastHint: Double tap to play this episode.
feed.openVideoHint: Double tap to open this video.
feed.openAndroid: Double tap to open. Double tap and hold for more options.
feed.openHintIosArticle: Double tap to open in reader view. Swipe up or down to access Save, Mark Read, Summary, Share, and Set Marker.
feed.openHintIosPodcast: Double tap to play. Swipe up or down to access Queue, Save, Mark Read, Summary, Share, and Set Marker.
feed.openHintIosVideo: Double tap to open video. Swipe up or down to access Save, Mark Read, Share, and Set Marker.
feed.addToQueueHint: Double tap to add this episode to the playback queue.
feed.saveHint: Double tap to save this {{type}} for later.
feed.removeHint: Double tap to remove this {{type}} from saved.
feed.copyLinkHint: Double tap to copy the link to your clipboard.
feed.viewOnWebHint: Double tap to open in your web browser.
feed.shareHint: Double tap to open the share sheet.
feed.setMarkerHint: Double tap to set a timeline marker at this item.

errors.unableToLoad: Unable to load Main Street Gazette data.
errors.refreshFailed_other: Refresh failed for {{count}} sources. First error: {{message}}
errors.sourceUnavailable: {{name}} is temporarily unavailable. Showing cached articles.

toast.newArticles: Welcome back. {{count}} new article since your last visit.
toast.newArticles_one: Welcome back. {{count}} new article since your last visit.
toast.newArticles_other: Welcome back. {{count}} new articles since your last visit.

intelligence.aiSummariesDesc: Use Apple Intelligence to generate one-sentence summaries for articles without one. Requires iPhone 16 or later with iOS 26.
intelligence.translateDesc: Use Apple's on-device translation to read article summaries in your device language. Requires iOS 17.4 or later.
intelligence.unavailable: Apple Intelligence is not available on this device or iOS version.
intelligence.translationUnavailable: On-device translation is not available on this device or iOS version.

detail.saveHint: Double tap to save this item for later.
detail.unsaveHint: Double tap to remove this {{type}} from saved items.
detail.playHint: Double tap to play this podcast episode.
detail.watchHint: Double tap to watch this video on its original website.
detail.continueReadingHint: Double tap to read the rest of this story on its original website.
detail.openOriginalWebsiteHint: Double tap to open the original website in your browser.
detail.aboutInformationHint: Double tap to learn where this information comes from.

location.label: Location
location.adjustHint: Swipe up or down to change location, or double tap to select the currently focused option below.

timeline.label: Recency
timeline.adjustHint: Swipe up or down to change recency, or double tap to select the currently focused option below.

personalization.title: Personalization

section.feedModeDesc: Choose what the News tab shows by default when story grouping is on.
section.favoritesDesc: Pick regions, parks, and topics you care about. A story appears in "Favorites" (on the News tab) if it matches at least one of these.
section.hideFromFavoritesDesc: Topics picked here are always excluded from Favorites, even if a story also matches a favorite above.
section.notificationsDesc: Controls how many notifications you receive from Main Street Gazette.

personalization.whyRecommendedDesc: Adds a small caption to Favorites cards explaining which region, park, or topic matched (e.g. "Because you follow Magic Kingdom").

notificationProfile.quietDesc: Only official announcements, major closures, and saved favorites.
notificationProfile.balancedDesc: Major news, favorites, and important official updates.
notificationProfile.breakingHeavyDesc: More alerts for fast-moving Disney parks news and high-confidence rumors.

personalization.officialAlwaysDesc: Official Disney announcements always notify, even in Quiet mode.
personalization.breakingOnlyDesc: Only notify for breaking news and official announcements.
personalization.safetyAlertsDesc: High-confidence closure and safety alerts notify regardless of profile.

myMagic.title: My Magic
myMagic.intro: Choose destinations and topics the Gazette should highlight.
myMagic.destinationsDesc: Pick the Disney destinations you care about most.
myMagic.interestsDesc: Media type isn't an interest — articles, podcasts, and videos all remain ways to experience a topic.

collections.noStories: No stories yet. Check back soon.
collections.followHint: Double tap to follow this collection and get updates.
collections.unfollowHint: Double tap to unfollow this collection.

discover.title: Explore Disney
discover.prompt: Where would you like to go today?
discover.searchHint: Enter words to search article titles, summaries, sources, and tags.
discover.parksSubtitle: Wait times, hours, weather, and trip planning

destinations.parkSubtitle: Live park information, Gazette coverage, and planning guidance
destinations.dclComingSoonBody: Cruise planning information isn't available in the Gazette yet.

search.emptyBody: Try different keywords or remove a filter.

filterBar.a11yHint: Select a filter to change which stories are shown.

emptyState.title: No stories found
emptyState.body: Try a different filter or pull to refresh.
emptyState.topStories: No top stories right now. Pull to refresh.
emptyState.last3Days: No stories in the last three days.
emptyState.saved: You haven't saved any stories yet.
